title.en: Port-Based Network Access Control: The Overview (Clause 1)
title.zh: 基于端口的网络访问控制：标准概览（第 1 章）

blocks.en: IEEE Std 802.1X-2020 is the standard for Port-Based Network Access Control (PNAC) — the gatekeeper that decides who is allowed to send and receive data on an IEEE 802 Local Area Network (LAN). Clause 1, the Overview, is your map of the whole document: it states what the standard covers (Scope, 1.1), why it exists (Purpose, 1.2), the architecture in plain words (Introduction, 1.3), and a clause-by-clause table of what the rest of the standard specifies (Provisions, 1.4). This lesson walks all four so you can navigate 802.1X with confidence.
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.1X-2020 是“基于端口的网络访问控制”（Port-Based Network Access Control，简称 PNAC）的标准——它就像一个门卫，决定谁有权在 IEEE 802 局域网（Local Area Network，简称 LAN）上收发数据。第 1 章“概览”是整份文档的地图：它说明标准涵盖什么（范围，1.1）、为何存在（目的，1.2）、用通俗语言描述架构（引言，1.3），并逐章列出标准其余部分规定了哪些内容（本标准的规定，1.4）。本课带你走完这四个小节，让你能够自信地读懂 802.1X。

blocks.en: Start with Scope (1.1). The standard exists to provide compatible authentication, authorization, and cryptographic key-agreement mechanisms so that devices connected by an 802 LAN can communicate securely. To do that it (a) specifies a general method for port-based network access control, (b) specifies protocols that establish secure associations for IEEE Std 802.1AE MAC Security (MACsec) — the companion standard that actually encrypts the data frames — and (c) facilitates use of industry-standard authentication and authorization protocols rather than reinventing them.
blocks.zh: 先看范围（1.1）。本标准的存在是为了提供兼容的身份认证（authentication）、授权（authorization）和密钥协商（key agreement）机制，使得通过 802 局域网相连的设备能够安全通信。为此它：（a）规定一种通用的基于端口的网络访问控制方法；（b）规定为 IEEE Std 802.1AE MAC 安全（MAC Security，简称 MACsec，即真正对数据帧加密的配套标准）建立安全关联的协议；（c）便于使用业界标准的认证与授权协议，而不是重新发明一套。

blocks.en: Purpose (1.2) answers "why bother?" IEEE 802 LANs carry critical data, run mission-critical applications, and sometimes charge for service — yet the very protocols that configure and manage these networks usually run over the network itself. Port-based network access control guards the door: it blocks transmission and reception by unidentified or unauthorized parties, defending against network disruption, theft of service, and data loss.
blocks.zh: 目的（1.2）回答“为什么要这么做？”。IEEE 802 局域网承载关键数据、运行关键业务应用，有时还按服务收费——可是用来配置和管理这些网络的协议本身往往就跑在该网络之上。基于端口的网络访问控制把守着这扇门：它阻止身份不明或未经授权的各方收发数据，从而防范网络中断、盗用服务和数据丢失。

blocks.en: Key idea: "port" here is not a TCP/UDP port number. It is the service access point where a station or bridge attaches to the LAN MAC — the logical doorway 802.1X controls. The whole standard is built around turning that doorway into a guarded checkpoint.
blocks.zh: 关键点：这里的“端口”（port）不是 TCP/UDP 端口号，而是站点或网桥接入局域网 MAC 的服务接入点（service access point）——也就是 802.1X 所控制的那道逻辑大门。整份标准就是围绕“把这道门变成有人把守的检查站”而构建的。

blocks.en: Introduction (1.3) sketches the architecture. Stations send and receive frames through a port — a service access point on the LAN MAC. PNAC defines cooperative functional elements that split that one physical attachment into two logical ports: a Controlled Port that carries secure, access-controlled traffic only after authorization, and an Uncontrolled Port that always passes the bootstrap traffic needed to start authentication (or traffic that needs no protection). Mutual authentication happens between a Port Access Entity (PAE) on the Controlled Port and a peer PAE in the station that wants to talk through it. Once authenticated, communication is secured against eavesdroppers, and the Controlled Port is given access-control attributes matching the peer's authorization.
blocks.zh: 引言（1.3）勾勒出架构。站点通过一个端口（即局域网 MAC 上的服务接入点）收发帧。PNAC 定义了一组相互协作的功能单元，把这一个物理接入拆成两个逻辑端口：受控端口（Controlled Port），仅在授权之后才承载受访问控制保护的安全流量；非受控端口（Uncontrolled Port），始终放行启动认证所需的引导流量（或无需保护的流量）。双向认证发生在受控端口上的端口访问实体（Port Access Entity，简称 PAE）与希望通过该端口通信的站点中的对等 PAE 之间。认证完成后，通信即可防窃听，受控端口还会被赋予与对方授权相匹配的访问控制属性。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 220" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><text x="60" y="20" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="13" text-anchor="middle">Supplicant station</text><text x="400" y="20" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="13" text-anchor="middle">Authenticator</text><rect x="20" y="35" width="110" height="55" rx="6"/><text x="75" y="60" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">peer PAE</text><text x="75" y="77" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">(Supplicant)</text><rect x="330" y="35" width="110" height="55" rx="6"/><text x="385" y="60" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">PAE</text><text x="385" y="77" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">(Authenticator)</text><line x1="130" y1="62" x2="330" y2="62"/><text x="230" y="55" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">IEEE 802 LAN</text><rect x="300" y="120" width="160" height="40" rx="6"/><text x="380" y="144" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Uncontrolled Port</text><rect x="300" y="170" width="160" height="40" rx="6" stroke-dasharray="5 4"/><text x="380" y="194" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Controlled Port</text><line x1="385" y1="90" x2="385" y2="120"/><text x="150" y="140" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">always open:</text><text x="150" y="154" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">EAPOL bootstrap</text><text x="150" y="190" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">opens only after</text><text x="150" y="204" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">authorization</text></svg>

caption.en: One physical attachment, two logical ports. The Uncontrolled Port always passes authentication bootstrap traffic; the Controlled Port (dashed) opens only after the PAEs mutually authenticate.
caption.zh: 一个物理接入，两个逻辑端口。非受控端口始终放行认证引导流量；受控端口（虚线）只有在双方 PAE 完成相互认证后才打开。

blocks.en: The Introduction also names the two operating modes. Where the LAN between a Controlled Port and its peer is physically secure, authorization alone is enough — no extra protection protocol is needed, and that mode is supported. More often, intrusion into the LAN is the real threat, so mutual authentication does double duty: it both authorizes the port and securely distributes master keys to the peers. Proof of possessing a master key later serves as proof of mutual authentication inside the key-agreement protocols, which then generate the keys that cryptographically protect each data frame.
blocks.zh: 引言还指出了两种运行模式。当受控端口与其对端之间的局域网在物理上是安全的时候，仅授权就足够了——无需额外的保护协议，标准也支持这种模式。但更常见的情况是，对局域网的入侵才是真正的威胁，因此双向认证身兼两职：既对端口授权，又向各对端安全地分发主密钥（master key）。此后，能够证明持有主密钥就等于证明了在密钥协商协议中通过了双向认证，而协议随即生成用于对每一数据帧进行加密保护的密钥。

blocks.en: Two more pieces complete 1.3. First, the carrier protocol: 802.1X uses EAP — the Extensible Authentication Protocol (IETF RFC 3748) — to authenticate against a centrally administered Authentication Server, and defines EAP encapsulation over LANs (EAPOL, specified in Clause 11) to carry those exchanges between peer PAEs. Second, the back-end: access can be restricted by controls bound to the authentication result and distributed via AAA (Authentication, Authorization, and Accounting) protocols such as RADIUS (RFC 2865) or Diameter (RFC 6733). For MAC Security, the standard specifies generation of the Secure Association Keys (SAKs) that MACsec uses. IEEE Std 802.11 Wireless LANs reuses this same PAE to authenticate wireless stations to access points.
blocks.zh: 还有两块拼图补全了 1.3。其一是承载协议：802.1X 使用 EAP——可扩展认证协议（Extensible Authentication Protocol，IETF RFC 3748）——向集中管理的认证服务器（Authentication Server）进行认证，并定义了 EAP 在局域网上的封装（EAP encapsulation over LANs，简称 EAPOL，在第 11 章规定），用于在对等 PAE 之间传递这些交互。其二是后端：访问权限可由绑定到认证结果的控制策略来限制，并通过 AAA（认证、授权与计费，Authentication, Authorization, and Accounting）协议分发，例如 RADIUS（RFC 2865）或 Diameter（RFC 6733）。对于 MAC 安全，本标准规定了 MACsec 所用的安全关联密钥（Secure Association Key，简称 SAK）的生成方式。IEEE Std 802.11 无线局域网复用了这同一个 PAE，用来对无线站点与接入点之间进行认证。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  S[Supplicant PAE] -->|EAPOL| A[Authenticator PAE]
  A -->|EAP over RADIUS/Diameter| AS[Authentication / AAA Server]
  AS -->|Accept + attributes| A
  A -->|Open Controlled Port| C[Authorized data]
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  S[请求方 PAE] -->|EAPOL| A[认证方 PAE]
  A -->|EAP 经 RADIUS/Diameter| AS[认证 / AAA 服务器]
  AS -->|接受 + 属性| A
  A -->|打开受控端口| C[已授权数据]

summary.en: Coverage map — Provisions of this standard (1.4): which clause specifies what
summary.zh: 覆盖地图——本标准的规定（1.4）：哪一章规定哪些内容

blocks.en: Clause 1.4 lists how the Scope (1.1) is delivered, pointing at the rest of the document — this is the master index. (a) Principles of PNAC operation and the protocol components → Clause 6. (b) The PAE component supporting authentication, authorization, and key agreement so a MAC Security Entity (SecY) can protect a port → 6.3 and Clause 12. (c) A Port Access Controller (PAC) component for physically secure, point-to-point links → 6.4. (d) The key hierarchy used by PAE and SecY → 6.2. (e) Use of EAP with a central Authentication/AAA Server → Clause 8. (f) The EAPOL encapsulation format → Clause 11. (g) The MAC Security Key Agreement protocol (MKA) to discover associations and agree SecY keys → Clause 9. (h) The EAPOL Announcement protocol advertising available network services → Clause 10. (i) Management requirements / managed objects for PAEs → 12.9. (j) SMIv2 MIB objects for SNMPv3 management → Clause 13. (k) YANG configuration and state models → Clause 14. Application scenarios are illustrated in Clause 7; conformance requirements for PAEs and PACs are defined in Clause 5; Annex A holds the PICS (Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement) proformas. The informative Annexes F (unsecured multi-access LANs), E (Wake-on-LAN background), and D (EAP/RADIUS usage guidelines) round it out. Note one explicit boundary: association discovery and key agreement for 802.11 Wireless LANs are outside this standard's scope — 802.11 merely uses the PAE defined here.
blocks.zh: 第 1.4 节列出范围（1.1）是如何落实的，逐一指向文档其余部分——这是一份总索引。（a）PNAC 运行原理及构成它的协议组件 → 第 6 章。（b）支持认证、授权与密钥协商、从而让 MAC 安全实体（MAC Security Entity，简称 SecY）保护端口的 PAE 组件 → 6.3 与第 12 章。（c）面向物理安全的点对点链路的端口访问控制器（Port Access Controller，简称 PAC）组件 → 6.4。（d）PAE 与 SecY 使用的密钥层级 → 6.2。（e）配合集中式认证 / AAA 服务器使用 EAP → 第 8 章。（f）EAPOL 封装格式 → 第 11 章。（g）用于发现关联并就 SecY 密钥达成一致的 MAC 安全密钥协商协议（MACsec Key Agreement，简称 MKA）→ 第 9 章。（h）通告可用网络服务的 EAPOL 通告协议 → 第 10 章。（i）PAE 的管理要求 / 受管对象 → 12.9。（j）供 SNMPv3 管理使用的 SMIv2 MIB 对象 → 第 13 章。（k）YANG 配置与运行状态模型 → 第 14 章。应用场景在第 7 章举例说明；PAE 与 PAC 的符合性要求在第 5 章定义；附录 A 提供 PICS（协议实现符合性声明，Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement）格式表。资料性附录 F（未加保护的多址局域网）、E（Wake-on-LAN 背景）与 D（EAP/RADIUS 使用指南）作为补充。请留意一条明确的边界：802.11 无线局域网的关联发现与密钥协商不在本标准范围内——802.11 只是使用这里定义的 PAE。

blocks.en: How to read the rest of the standard: treat 1.4 as your jump table. Want the architecture? Clause 6. The wire format of authentication frames? Clause 11 (EAPOL). The key-agreement handshake? Clause 9 (MKA). Management models? Clauses 12.9, 13, 14. Worked examples? Clause 7. Almost every later clause is foreshadowed here in one sentence.
blocks.zh: 如何读懂标准其余部分：把 1.4 当作你的跳转表。想看架构？第 6 章。想看认证帧的线路格式？第 11 章（EAPOL）。想看密钥协商握手？第 9 章（MKA）。想看管理模型？12.9、第 13、14 章。想看实例？第 7 章。几乎后面每一章都已在这里用一句话作了预告。

blocks.en: Putting Clause 1 together: 802.1X stands a guard at every port (1.2), defines that guard as a general, reusable method plus the protocols that bootstrap MACsec and lean on industry-standard AAA (1.1), realizes it through Controlled/Uncontrolled ports, PAEs, EAP/EAPOL, and key agreement (1.3), and then hands you a clause-numbered roadmap to everything that follows (1.4). With this overview internalized, the deeper clauses stop being a wall of text and become a set of well-signposted rooms.
blocks.zh: 把第 1 章合起来看：802.1X 在每个端口前站一名门卫（1.2）；把这名门卫定义为一套通用、可复用的方法，外加为 MACsec 引导并依托业界标准 AAA 的协议（1.1）；通过受控/非受控端口、PAE、EAP/EAPOL 与密钥协商把它落地（1.3）；最后交给你一张带章节编号的路线图，指向其后的全部内容（1.4）。把这份概览内化之后，更深入的各章便不再是密密麻麻的文字墙，而成了一间间标识清晰的房间。

cites.note: Clause 1 Overview: 1.1 Scope and 1.2 Purpose (p.17), 1.3 Introduction (p.17-18), 1.4 Provisions of this standard (p.18-19).
